Custom Magnetic Signs

Promote Your Brand Anywhere With Custom Magnetic Signs. 

 

  • Product Overview

Material

Magnetic Sign Material

Before purchasing magnets please make sure the intended surface is magnetic receptive. Magnets won't stick to aluminum or plastic vehicle body panels.

• 30 mil magentic material
• Lamination included
• Max print size is 24" x 24"
• Printed in full color

 

Magnet Cut Options

Magnetic Sign Cut Options

The standard finishing option is rounded corners. When you select rounded corners, it provides better airflow over your magnet and reduces the chances of it coming off. Contour or square cut options are also available. 

Artwork

Artwork Guidelines

Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps— with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your magnet project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Production Times

At Banners.com, we offer flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need to order.

Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option. 

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

Payment

All magnets must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog..

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

Shipping

General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after initial scheduled delivery.

International shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Shipping Maps

Magnets

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods for magnetic signs:

Standard ( 3–5 Business Days )
Three Day ( 3 Business Days )
Two Day ( 2 Business Days )
Overnight ( 1 Business Day )
UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300 and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Upgrade your advertising game with magnetic signs that showcase your brand on any magnetic surface. Perfect for businesses looking to create professional, high-quality signs, these versatile solutions offer convenience and style without permanent commitment. Whether you need magnetic business signs or truck magnets, elevate your presence today with custom magnetic signs tailored to your needs.

      Add to Cart

      More About Custom Magnetic Signs Return to Top

      Order custom magnetic signs and turn any metal surface into an effective, reusable promotional tool. Our custom magnetic signs are a flexible yet affordable option for businesses, events, warehouses, temporary signage needs, or really any practical use you can come up with! Constructed from a durable 30 mil material, our magnetic signs are built to withstand daily wear while keeping your image front and center.

      Apply them to vehicles, storefronts, metal doors, shelving, or appliances—any flat magnetic-receptive surface. They're easy to place, reposition, and remove whenever needed.

      Our magnetic signs feature full-bleed, edge-to-edge printing for a clean yet professional look. Available in standard square-cut, rounded corners, or contour-cut for the custom shape of your logo or design.

      Our magnetic signs are made with durable materials and fade-resistant printing, ensuring that long-lasting performance you're looking for, indoors or out. For a more unified look, you can pair them with other marketing signage such as custom A-frame signs, vinyl banners, and custom-printed flags to create that cohesive brand identity!

      Start designing your custom magnetic sign by using one of our templates or upload your completed artwork from your own designer. Need help? Contact one of our professional graphic designers to assist you in creating a unique and professional design tailored to your needs.

      Begin your order today!

       

      Why Choose Banners.com for Custom Magnetic Signs

      Custom magnetic signs are a versatile yet professional way to display messages, branding, or visuals on any magnetic surface. At Banners.com, we create high-quality custom magnetic signs that are designed to last while providing the bold, full-color look you need. Whether you're promoting indoors or outdoors, personal or promotional, or just trying to stay organized, our magnetic signage is suited for the job.

      Pair your magnetic signs with other durable options like our custom metal signs, custom styrene signs, premium fabric banners, or corrugated plastic signage to enhance your branding strategy.

       

      Unmatched Customer Service

      At Banners.com, we’re dedicated to delivering exceptional products and customer care. Customers like GentleGrasshopper appreciate the quality of our service, sharing: "Ordered two vehicle magnets, delivery was quick and quality of both the artwork and materials were excellent."

      Here’s why businesses trust us for their custom magnetic vehicle signs:

      • Live Design Support: Collaborate with our experts to create the perfect magnetic car signs that reflect your brand’s image.
      • Free Proofing Services: Review and refine your magnetic sign design with free digital proofs to ensure perfection.
      • Fast Turnaround & Shipping: On a tight deadline? We offer quick production and shipping so you can get your magnetic car door signs exactly when you need them.
      • Durable Materials: Our signs are made to last, featuring weather-resistant materials that ensure long-lasting performance for your custom magnetic signs.

       

      Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

      What are custom magnetic signs used for?

      Custom magnetic signs are removable signs commonly used for vehicle advertising, temporary business signage, and promotions on metal surfaces.

      What surfaces do magnetic signs stick to?

      Magnetic signs stick to clean, flat, ferromagnetic metal surfaces such as steel, iron, nickel, and cobalt.

      Are your custom magnetic signs compatible with vehicles?

      Yes—magnetic signs adhere to vehicles that have steel body panels. Adhesion may be limited or not work on panels made from aluminum, fiberglass, plastic, carbon fiber, or some stainless steel, so test the panel with a small magnet first.

      What cut options do you offer for custom magnetic signs?

      We offer square cut, rounded-corner square cut, and contour cut (cut to the shape of your design).

      Are your magnetic signs printed in full color?

      Yes—magnetic signs are printed in full CMYK color.

      Do you offer bulk or quantity discounts on magnetic signs?

      Yes—quantity discounts are available, and the per-unit price decreases as you order more.

      Are magnetic signs weather-resistant?

      They are weather-resistant due to a protective laminate, but they are not intended for permanent exposure in harsh conditions.

      How long do magnetic signs last?

      With proper use and care, magnetic signs can last up to 5 years.

      Can I write on a magnetic sign?

      Yes—you can write on magnetic signs using a dry erase marker or a permanent marker.

      Will magnetic signs damage my vehicle paint?

      Magnetic signs are non-adhesive and won’t damage paint when applied to a clean, smooth, dry surface.

       

      Custom Magnetic Signs

      Get Started with Personalized Magnetic Signs Here:

      Pick a Magnetic Sign Template We have lots of customizable templates to choose from.
      Upload a File Upload your own print-ready file. Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps—with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files.
      Let Us Design Our team of professional graphic designers can create a custom design for you. Upload any artwork you want on your banner and provide instructions for us.
       

      Why Choose Banners.com?

      Customer Service

      Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

      Fast Turnaround

      Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

       

      Quality Products

      Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

      Live Order Tracking

      Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
